title: Record soft26 handoff28 and tool1.5k densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft26 Handoff28 Tool15k Contract

## Soft 26
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.26 with quality bias floor 0.24 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 28
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.28 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Tool 1.5k
tool result budgets default to 1500 chars with 25-char previews; Grep head defaults to 120 for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status vitest
